title: 5 traits God builds in you before he sends her
caption:
She'll see it before you do.

Most men spend their 20s chasing the right woman. They're searching before they've built anything worth finding.

God isn't slow. He's building 5 things in you while you wait.

TRAIT 1 — Govern yourself first.
You can't be trusted with her if you can't be trusted with yourself. A man who can't say no at midnight won't say yes when it costs him. You can't lead what you can't govern.

TRAIT 2 — Know what you're for.
A man who doesn't know where he's going will take her nowhere. She's not your purpose — she's someone you carry your purpose alongside. The man with no mission makes her the mission. She can't hold that weight.

TRAIT 3 — Planted in real men.
"Iron sharpens iron, and one man sharpens another." — Proverbs 27:17. One man who knows your sin and will pick up the phone changes everything. She can't be your only person — and she shouldn't have to be.

TRAIT 4 — Fight your own battles.
Not perfect. Just fighting. A man who won't war against his sin in private will bring it into the marriage. Kill what's killing you before she inherits the debt.

TRAIT 5 — Rooted in the Word.
Before she can be a daily rhythm in your life, the Word has to be. A man with no root can't hold anything steady. Root yourself before you try to hold her.

—

theme: He chases God, not a wife.
